summary: Power limiting tests using IPMI commands resulted in an error due to incorrect policy ID.
evidence: RAW LOGS: Manually determined limiting policy was 74, but actual limiting policy ID obtained through IPMI command was 101.

summary: Attempt to send raw PECI commands using `ipmitool` resulted in unknown return code 0xAC.
evidence: RAW LOGS: Return codes mentioned include 0x0 and 0x1, but not 0xAC.
